properties.name: Inflatable World
properties.description: A massive indoor arena filled with bouncy obstacles and giant slides. Perfect for high-energy kids on a rainy day in Cookstown.

properties.name: DJ's Golf Driving Range
properties.description: A great spot for older kids and teens to practice their swing. Features modern bays and a relaxed atmosphere for budding golfers.

properties.name: Todds Leap Activity Centre
properties.description: Northern Ireland's ultimate adventure destination! From off-road racing to zip lines and giant swings, it's perfect for a big family day out.
